title: Youssefx64/End-to-End-Nutrition-RAG-System
summary: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based multilingual chatbot specialized in nutrition & diet planning. It combines powerful NLP models with a curated nutrition knowledge base to provide personalized diet recommendations, meal plans, and fitness tips based on user input (age, weight, activity level, health goals, dietary preferences).

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
